heading: Wednesday Night
text: Becoming cloudy. Showers likely in New York, with a rising chance elsewhere, mainly after midnight, and a chance late northeast  Lows in the low to mid 40s east of the Greens, mid to upper 40s west. Southeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Cloudy. Rain likely, then diminishing to showers in the afternoon, except a steadier rain continuing northeast. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s. South winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming northwest.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Showers tapering off southwest to northeast, with a few rain or snow showers late over the northern mountains, and partial clearing south. Lows in the 30s west to near 40 east. Northwest winds 5 to 15 mph.
